command.title: Command
command.description: Shell command to run when the hook event fires

args.title: Args
args.description: Arguments passed to the hook command

timeout.title: Timeout
timeout.description: Timeout in seconds for this hook (overrides global timeout)

url.title: URL
url.description: HTTP endpoint invoked for webhook-style hooks

auto_sync.title: Auto Sync
auto_sync.description: Propagate config changes from any agent to all configured agents

random_agent_names.title: Random Agent Names
random_agent_names.description: Assign random display names to agents

agent.title: Agent Settings
agent.description: Common settings applied to the code agent

otel.title: Telemetry
otel.description: OpenTelemetry export settings for omni's own logs and traces

endpoint.title: Endpoint
endpoint.description: OTLP gRPC or HTTP endpoint (e.g. http://localhost:4317)

environment.title: Environment
environment.description: Deployment environment tag (e.g. dev / staging / prod)

log_prompts.title: Log Prompts
log_prompts.description: Include user prompt text in trace spans

headers.title: Headers
headers.description: Additional OTLP export headers (e.g. Authorization: Bearer token)

model.title: Model
model.description: AI model identifier (e.g. claude-sonnet-4-6 / o4-mini / gemini-2.5-pro)

timeout.title: Timeout
timeout.description: Timeout in seconds for individual tool or hook invocations

maxTurns.title: Max Turns
maxTurns.description: Maximum number of agentic turns allowed per prompt execution

sandbox.title: Sandbox
sandbox.description: Sandbox or permission mode for tool execution

env.title: Environment Variables
env.description: Environment variables passed to the agent or spawned tools

hooks.title: Hooks
hooks.description: Lifecycle hooks mapped by event name to a list of hook commands

theme.title: Theme
theme.description: UI theme name applied to the agent terminal output

cwd.title: Working Directory
cwd.description: Working directory used when spawning the agent or tool processes

logPrompts.title: Log Prompts
logPrompts.description: Whether to log user prompts in the agent session output
